arts.ttl: Aston Villa suffer big Emi Martinez blow in Chelsea clash
arts.sum: Emi Martinez came off at half-time in Aston Villa's Premier League clash against Chelsea. Martinez was replaced by Robin Olsen, who is making his first appearance of the season after struggling with injury at the start of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports respond to Chelsea vs Aston Villa TV issue as commentary cuts out
arts.sum: Upon cutting back to the three pundits at Anfield, Jones said: "Well unfortunately we have a few technical and audio issues which you can hear at Stamford Bridge or not hear more to the point. After three minutes of chat in the Sky Sports studio, Jones said: "Disappointingly, it seems like our errors are fixed at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: What Chelsea icon Frank Lampard did during Coventry equaliser speaks volumes
arts.sum: One of Lampard's key decisions was to start Ephron-Clark, who quickly justified his selection by scoring just eight minutes into the match, marking the first goal under their new head coach. With Coventry trailing after Yakou Meite and Alex Robertson overturned Ephron Mason-Clark's early goal, it looked like defeat was on the cards.

arts.ttl: I never wanted to leave Chelsea - I was forced to leave and Aston Villa saved me
arts.sum: Ian Maatsen will face Chelsea for the first time since leaving the club over the summer as he visits Stamford Bridge along with his new side Aston Villa on Sunday in the Premier League. Despite this progress, which follows an impressive year to date for the versatile defender, Maatsen has only started one league game for Villa, which came last weekend in a 2-2 draw to Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports viewers left bemused as Chelsea vs Aston Villa kicks off without sound and commentary
arts.sum: Supporters watching the Chelsea vs Aston Villa clash on television were left without commentary for four minutes at the start of the Premier League clash. It is a huge clash of two Premier League titans that Sky Sports will be hoping is not beset by more technical difficulties.

arts.ttl: Why Chelsea were awarded indirect free-kick vs Aston Villa as back pass rule explained
arts.sum: The Villa goalkeeper quickly got up to his feet to collect the loose ball, but Pau Torres touched it just before he got his hands to it, and thus referee Stuart Atwell was left with no choice but to award an indirect free-kick. As players cannot shoot directly from it, Enzo Fernandez laid him off, but the Blues' talisman saw his attempt saved by the sprawling arm of Martinez.

arts.ttl: 'Jackson is BETTER than Osimhen' - Chelsea fans make transfer plea
arts.sum: Chelsea fans have urged their club to avoid signing Victor Osimhen in 2025 amid Nicolas Jackson ’s immense recent form. However, several Blues supporters believe Osimhen would be an unnecessary signing given Jackson’s flying start to the new season.

arts.ttl: 'The finish of a poacher' | Jackson gets Chelsea's early opener in off the post
arts.sum: Marc Cucurella crosses the ball over to Nicolas Jackson who cooly guides the shot in off the near post.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports PUNDITS are forced to provide commentary for Chelsea vs Aston Villa clash from Anfield - after Stamford Bridge audio cuts out
arts.sum: A major technical hitch at Stamford Bridge led to the audio cutting out, scrambling host David Jones into an impromptu segment live on air.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Sky Sports apologise for Chelsea vs Aston Villa issues as David Jones immediately blunders
arts.sum: Chelsea vs Aston Villa was the first match of a Premier League double-header on Sky Sports, ahead of Liverpool vs Manchester City, but there were early issues with the broadcast
